title: corylus sieboldiana var. mandshurica
intro: Corylus sieboldiana var. mandshurica, also known as the Manchurian hazel or Manchurian filbert, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corylus sieboldiana var. mandshurica include lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an anti-diabetic agent, as well as having anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Corylus sieboldiana var. mandshurica include tea infusions, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
